span.p: Component View: Forge v2 - Orchestrator Engine

span.div:
Calls query() each iteration
(loads the dev/unifier skill)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
Commits worktree changes +
runs the project quality gate

Emits per-iteration cost +
tool events to

span.div:
Moves the manifest to done /
ready-for-review

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
Advances the council one step
via SDK

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
Writes the draft initiative +
PLAN to the session

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
gh pr create / view; git push
/ fetch / ff

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
Reads the event log; writes
REPORT.md to

span.div:
Writes the demo bundle + PR
description to the worktree

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
Has its remote on / PRs
opened against

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
Runs forge serve / watch /
status / metrics in

display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
Drives the in-UI architect
runner + scheduler controls

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
Adds a worktree per claimed
initiative

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
Runs a cycle per claimed
initiative

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
The single human running
forge across side projects.
Touches the system at exactly
three points: architect (idea
-> initiative), review
(engage the PR), reflection
(feedback).

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
Anthropic's agent runtime +
harness (model calls, tool
use, prompt caching). Every
forge agent runs here; forge
hosts no model runtime,
vector DB, or harness of its
own.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
Hosts the managed-project
repos. The PR is the
operator's sole review +
merge surface; merge state is
the single terminal signal.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
A side-project git repo forge
develops (trafficGame,
terraform-provider-betterado,
claude-harness...). Has its
own quality gate and its own
Brain 3. Worktrees branch
from it.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
~150-line forever loop:
claims pending initiatives,
spawns each in a worktree,
heartbeats, recovers orphans,
notifies.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
Routes a finished cycle's
terminal status: done /
failed / bounded auto-retry
back to pending.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
Detached `forge serve`
process state: pid,
pause/resume flag, serve.log.

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
Thin orchestration: threads
phase outputs into the next
phase, emits start/end
events, classifies failures,
snapshots artifacts.
Resumable from the unifier
(ADR 019).

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
Phase 1: invoke
project-manager to decompose
the initiative into atomic,
dependency-ordered work
items.

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
Phase 2: walk the WI DAG
topologically, run a Ralph
loop per work item, then the
unifier (final Ralph) for
cross-WI proof + demo + PR
body.

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
Phase 3: open the
demo-embedded PR (thin,
non-LLM); the PR is the
operator's surface. Never
merges.

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
Phase 4: the single
terminal-move authority.
Confirms the merge (gh pr
view), aligns local->remote,
moves the manifest to done/.

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
Phase 5 (post-merge only):
one-shot reflector that
digests the event log and
writes brain themes.

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
Swappable agentic loop:
re-read PROMPT/AGENT/fix_plan
-> SDK query() -> commit ->
check stop conditions (gate
pass | iteration/cost
budget). loops/_adapters is
the placeholder for
alternatives.

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
Single source of truth for
each phase's system+user
prompt, model, and
allowed/disallowed tools.

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
Atomic manifest transitions
via rename(); manifest +
work-item
parse/validate/topo-sort.

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
Thin wrapper over git
worktree add/remove/prune;
self-heals stale registry
state.

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
The only place forge shells
git push / gh pr; enforces
the local<->remote sync
invariant; shims gh locally
for no-origin projects.

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
Resolves the operator's
review verdict from
file/PR-comment handoffs.

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
Append-only JSONL event log +
tool-use telemetry. The
single source of truth for a
cycle.

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
Reads the event log
post-mortem; infers failure
mode + recoverability; writes
the human-facing REPORT.md.

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
Best-effort desktop + webhook
notifications on terminal
events.

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
Turn-based, file-checkpointed
architect driven from the UI
bridge (ADR 020); advances
one step per call via the LLM
council.

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
Per-machine forge.config.json
+ per-project
.forge/project.json (quality
gate, demo shape, heartbeat).

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
The Claude Code skill catalog
- forge's agent surface. Each
skill is a system prompt +
tool policy the engine loads
into an SDK query(). Brain
skills are the brain's
read/write API.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
forge subcommands (serve /
watch / status / metrics /
brain / requeue / send-back)
plus the three operator
slash-command handoffs.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
WebSocket + HTTP server
(:4123). Tails the event log
and scans the queue, streams
snapshots + events to the
browser, and accepts
verdict/feedback files.
Stateless: re-derives
everything from the stores.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
tmux 3-pane layout (serve
stdout / live event tail /
forge status --watch) plus an
Obsidian vault launcher.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
Filesystem state machine of
initiative manifests: pending
-> in-flight ->
ready-for-review -> done |
failed. Atomic rename
transitions; heartbeat files
enable crash recovery. done/
implies MERGED.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
Append-only per-cycle JSONL
event log plus snapshotted
work-items / demo /
REPORT.md. The replayable
source of truth for
reflection, the UI, and
metrics.
